title: China’s AI models have Trump’s AI world at war with itself
summary: Kimi and other Chinese models like it pose a real problem for Trump. Every time a new smart, free model from China like Kimi gets released, US companies see less reason to fork out money to access models from Anthropic or OpenAI.
caption: output/2026-07-20/china-s-ai-models-have-trump-s-ai-world-at-war-with-itself.txt
